# Hypersonic Defense Screener — Backtest Report
## June 07, 2026

---

## Parameters

| Parameter | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| Period | 5y |
| Buy threshold (technical score) | 60 |
| Sell threshold (technical score) | 45 |
| Signal type | Technical only |

---

## Honest Limitations

> - **Technical signals only** — fundamental and thesis
>   components cannot be backtested with free data
> - **Survivorship bias** — all tickers survived to today
> - **No transaction costs or slippage modeled**
> - **Past performance does not predict future results**
> - Results should be used to validate signal logic only,
>   not to project future returns

---
